name: mute-app
title: Mute App
description: Control audio output for individual Windows applications. Quickly mute or unmute running apps without affecting system volume.

commands.name: mute-app
commands.title: Mute App
commands.description: View and control audio for running applications

commands.name: toggle-custom-app-1
commands.title: Toggle Mute for App 1
commands.description: Quickly toggle mute for configured app

preferences.name: processName
preferences.title: Window Title / Process Name
preferences.description: Window title or name of the process to toggle (e.g., Google Chrome, chrome.exe)

preferences.name: showToast
preferences.title: Show Toast Notification
preferences.description: Display notification when toggling mute status
preferences.label: Show notification

preferences.name: refreshInterval
preferences.title: Refresh Interval
preferences.description: How often to refresh the list of sound sources

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

author: eli_revah
